6hefa2gu6pe86fpi217t1ltr18.summary: You must review the major takeaways from the July 22nd employee meeting and your strategic lunch with Arvy—the newly appointed technology leader. The employee session highlighted strong financial performance exceeding plan—offset by culture survey feedback demanding faster execution and reduced operational complexity. Your lunch meeting with Arvy established his core alignment principles—namely driving platform convergence, co-authoring the autumn technology strategy, and establishing early architecture checkpoints to stop executive tool sprawl.
tasks: Track the upcoming autumn technology strategy deliverables—ensuring alignment with the September, October, and November board timelines.
Enforce the Technology Acquisition Process with Global Sourcing and Procurement—blocking all final contract sign-offs until architecture is formally engaged.
Map all unmitigated architecture risks directly into the Archer IT risk system—utilizing clear red, yellow, and green governance indicators.
Streamline internal team decision-making structures—addressing the employee survey feedback regarding organizational fatigue and execution speed.
6hefa2gu6pe86fpi217t1ltr18.title: Weekly Staff – P&C CTO Leadership (series ends 1/7/27)

hdkc0mbtef3b3k6l1tqvtileog.summary: You must navigate the ongoing confusion between Skan and Celonis—specifically regarding task mining versus process mining—as leadership questions the need for Skan's desktop-level observations. While Celonis establishes your foundational Digital Twin through back-office event logs, it lacks the glass-view telemetry required for detailed human interaction mapping. The notes explicitly highlight using Celonis to optimize your current processes as a prerequisite phase—ensuring workflows are fully streamlined before you integrate GenAI automation.
tasks: Leverage the Celonis representative's email—which explicitly recommended Skan for desktop UI logs—to overcome RFP pushback from Suhas and Dan Griffiths.
Draft the high-level one-pager required by leadership—distilling Mark's deep technical white paper—to justify the Skan procurement.
Resolve the priority conflict between the 90-day horizontal PL3 mandate—led by Abe Cavatio—and the vertical 'Pay a Claim' visualization pivot.
Complete the Celonis architecture white paper—specifically addressing adjuster and front-office behavior—to establish the 360-degree process health layer.
hdkc0mbtef3b3k6l1tqvtileog.title: Discuss task mining AI capabilities
